final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: infographic-diagram
Asset type: step-by-step tutorial illustration, 4-panel layout
Primary request: visual guide showing how to deploy Hermes in Docker container and integrate with GLMCodingPlan, clearly numbered 1-2-3-4
Scene/backdrop: clean technical documentation layout, terminal window UI, Docker container visualization
Subject: Docker container deployment workflow, Hermes service architecture, GLMCodingPlan integration flow
Style/medium: flat vector illustration, technical diagram, clean infographic style
Composition/framing: 4 sequential panels arranged vertically or in 2x2 grid, each panel showing one numbered step
Lighting/mood: bright, clear, professional technical documentation aesthetic
Color palette: Docker blue (#2496ED), neutral grays, white backgrounds, accent colors for code highlights
Materials/textures: flat UI elements, terminal monospace text, container box icons, arrow connectors
Text (verbatim): "1", "2", "3", "4", "docker", "hermes", "glmcodingplan"
Constraints: must show 4 clearly numbered steps, must include Docker container element, must show Hermes deployment, must show GLMCodingPlan integration
Avoid: blurry text, cluttered layout, missing step numbers, inconsistent icon styles, watermark
